data.title: River Valley Community Bancorp Announces Financial Results (Unaudited) for the Quarter Ended March 31, 2026, and Quarterly Dividend
data.description: River Valley Community Bancorp, along with its subsidiary River Valley Community Bank, headquartered in Yuba City, California, disclosed unaudited financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. The Bank, trading under OTC markets as RVCB, declared a dividend of $0.07 per common share. Shareholders as of April 30, 2026, will receive the dividend on May 18, 2026. Further details can be accessed on the Bank’s Investor Relations website.

data.title: Sunwest Bank Has Entered into a Definitive Agreement to Acquire the Former MidWestOne and Bank of Denver Branches from Nicolet National Bank
data.description: In a recent announcement, Sunwest Bank, renowned as the Bank for Entrepreneurs by Entrepreneurs, disclosed its definitive agreement to acquire the previous MidWestOne and Bank of Denver branches from Nicolet National Bank. This strategic acquisition marks a significant milestone in Sunwest's expansion plans as it positions itself to broaden its reach. The deal signifies a positive growth trajectory for Sunwest Bank and highlights its commitment to serving a larger customer base.

data.title: Society Pass Incorporated (Nasdaq: SOPA) Nasdaq delinquency notification letter (the “Notice”)
data.description: On April 21, 2026, Society Pass Incorporated (Nasdaq: SOPA), a prominent e-commerce ecosystem in Southeast Asia, revealed receiving a delinquency letter from Nasdaq.

data.title: Driven Brands Holdings Inc. Provides Preliminary Unaudited Results for 2025 and Q1 2026 and Update on SEC Filing Status
data.description: Charlotte, N.C.--Driven Brands Holdings Inc. announced an update on the forthcoming financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ending December 27, 2025, along with the first quarter ending March 28, 2026. The Company, listed as NASDAQ: DRVN, provided preliminary unaudited figures. The status of the 2025 Form 10-K and the first quarter 2026 Form 10-Q filings were also discussed.

data.title: Sherritt Provides Notice of First Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call
data.description: Toronto-based Sherritt International Corporation (TSX:S) is set to announce its first quarter 2026 financial results on May 12, 2026, following the market close. A conference call and webcast with senior management will take place on May 13, 2026, at 10:00 am ET to discuss the Corporation's performance during the first quarter of 2026. For interested participants, the dial-in numbers are 1 (800) 717-1738 for North America and 1 (289) 514-5100 for international callers. The participant passcode for the call is 663.

data.title: Kalshi considers expanding into crypto with launch of perpetual futures amid US regulation changes.
data.description: Reports indicate that Kalshi is set to introduce crypto perpetual futures as part of its expansion beyond prediction markets. This move comes amidst the evolution of regulated derivatives offerings in the US. The crypto perpetual futures are geared towards meeting the demands of the market and enhancing the platform's offerings. This development reflects the growing interest in cryptocurrency trading, with Kalshi aiming to capitalize on this trend.Kalshi's decision to launch these futures underscores its commitment to innovation and adapting to market trends, positioning itself as a key player in the evolving financial landscape.

data.title: VICI Properties Inc. Enters Into Lease Agreement With Clairvest Related to MGM Northfield Park in Northfield, OH
data.description: In a recent announcement, VICI Properties Inc. revealed a new development regarding MGM Resort International's sale of MGM Northfield Park in Northfield, OH. The sale to an affiliate of funds managed by Clairvest Group Inc. has prompted VICI to enter into a fresh triple-net lease with a Clairvest affiliate. VICI Properties, listed on NYSE as VICI, finalized this agreement in conjunction with MGM Resorts, listed as MGM on NYSE. The new lease marks a significant shift in operations for Northfield Park and signifies a strategic move within the industry.

data.title: Trump Media & Technology Group Appoints Kevin McGurn as Interim Chief Executive Officer
data.description: In Sarasota, Florida on April 21, 2026, Trump Media and Technology Group Corp. (Nasdaq: DJT) disclosed the naming of Kevin J. McGurn as the Interim Chief Executive Officer (CEO) of the Company, which oversees social media platform Truth Social, video streaming service Truth+, and financial services brand Truth.Fi. This appointment becomes effective immediately.

data.title: Trade Perpetual Futures on Blockchain.com's self-custody wallets with Hyperliquid integration, enabling direct trading from Bitcoin balances.
data.description: Users of Blockchain.com now have the capability to directly trade perpetual futures using their self-custodied Bitcoin balances through an integration with Hyperliquid. This integration allows for seamless trading of perpetual futures contracts, providing users with more flexibility in managing their assets. The partnership between Blockchain.com and Hyperliquid opens up new opportunities for traders, leveraging Blockchain.com's user base of over 65 million wallets. This development signals a significant step forward in enhancing the trading experience for users, offering them more control and convenience in their transactions.

data.title: Discover the advantages of multi-tenant GPU clusters for AI workloads, ensuring efficiency with optimized resource usage.
data.description: Discover how multi-tenant GPU clusters are revolutionizing the way AI-native teams operate by providing both efficiency and isolation. By effectively utilizing resources, these clusters address capacity challenges while eliminating idle resources. Explore more about this innovative solution to enhance productivity and performance.

data.title: MGM RESORTS INTERNATIONAL ANNOUNCES COMPLETION OF THE SALE OF THE OPERATIONS OF MGM NORTHFIELD PARK
data.description: In an official statement on April 21, 2026, MGM Resorts International (NYSE: MGM) confirmed the completion of the sale of MGM Northfield Park's operations to private equity funds overseen by Clairvest Group Inc. (TSX: CVG). The sale marks a significant transaction in which the operations of MGM Northfield Park changed hands for an undisclosed amount. This move demonstrates MGM Resorts' strategic decision to divest this particular asset and entrust its management to Clairvest, showcasing the company's commitment to optimizing its portfolio.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise As Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire; Tesla Earnings Due
data.description: Following a decline in the stock market due to canceled talks, President Trump has decided to prolong the Iran ceasefire. The upcoming focus is on Tesla's forthcoming earnings report. Dow Jones Futures are showing a rise in response to these developments.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Falls As Oil Prices Rise, Trump Extends Ceasefire; These Gold Miners Fall (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline as oil prices surged, while gold stocks saw a significant sell-off. The market saw a drop in the Dow as oil prices rallied. Additionally, President Trump extended the ceasefire. This led to a decrease in the value of gold miners' stocks.

data.title: Bramshill Income Performance Fund Wins 2026 LSEG Lipper Award: Best Fund Over 5 Years Core Bond Funds
data.description: In Naples, Florida on April 21, 2026, Bramshill Investments revealed that the Bramshill Income Performance Fund has clinched victory in the 2026 LSEG Lipper Fund Award as the Best Fund Over 5 Years in the Core Bond Funds category in the United States. This recognition was bestowed upon the fund for its exceptional track record of delivering robust performance consistently over the past five years.

data.title: Xperi to Release First Quarter 2026 Results on May 6, 2026
data.description: Xperi Inc. (NYSE: XPER), an entertainment technology company known for creating innovative technologies to enhance experiences, is set to reveal its First Quarter 2026 financial results on May 6, 2026, after the market closes. The company will conduct an earnings conference call at 2 p.m. PDT (5 p.m. EDT) on the same day. For U.S. callers interested in joining the call, they can dial the toll-free number provided.
